description: Stamford Incense Cones - Opium 37169 Create a beautiful atmosphere with Stamford Opium Incense Cones. They release a heady fragrance perfect for indulgent entertaining and relaxation. We are an official stockist of the Stamford Incense range which is renowned the world over for its quality and variety of fragrances. Stamford Incense creates the perfect mood for relaxation or entertaining, and with the fantastic range of fragrances available there is something for everyone. Each Pack contains approximately 15 incense cones plus a metal holder. They are made from perfumery raw materials only, and the packaging is recyclable. Average burn time is 20 minutes per cone. Each pack of 15 cones is priced and sold individually and comes packaged in a card box.
